title: grammitis gordonii
intro: Grammitis gordonii, also known as Gotu Kola or Asiatic Pennywort, is a perennial plant native to Asia, belonging to the family Grammitidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Grammitis gordonii include improving cognitive function, promoting skin health, and enhancing wound healing, as well as reducing stress and anxiety levels. Grammitis gordonii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
